article.headline: Algeria come from behind to beat Jordan and bolster qualification hopes
article.description: Two second-half goals from corners saw Algeria come from behind to beat Jordan 2-1
article.linkText: Algeria come from behind to beat Jordan and bolster qualification hopes

images.name: 'Every Jordanian can be proud' - Jordan boss on Algeria defeat
images.caption: 'Every Jordanian can be proud' - Jordan boss on Algeria defeat

article.story:
Two second-half goals from corners saw Algeria come from behind to beat Jordan 2-1 and keep their hopes of reaching the World Cup round-of-32 alive.

Nadhir Benobuali and Amine Gouiri grabbed the decisive goals in Santa Clara after Nizar Al Rashdan's opener for Jordan, setting up a clash with Austria to decide who finishes second behind Argentina in Group J.

Al Rashdan headed a free kick wide for Jordan in the opening minute as both teams had early chances, Algeria enjoying more possession in the first period with Jordan threatening when they did push forward.

Riyad Mahrez, restored to the starting line-up, had a golden chance but could not bring the ball into a shooting position; the former Manchester City and Leicester City player also having a shot smothered by Yazeed Abulaila.

Gouiri and Farès Chaïbi also had chances, but Jordan went ahead after 35 minutes - a pullback making its way through a miskick to Al Rashdan, who found the bottom corner via a defender's heel and goalkeeper Luca Zidane's outstretched hand.

With Jordan seemingly happy to protect their lead, Algeria pressed for much of the second period, the lively Ibrahim Maza providing the biggest threat while Noor Al Rawabdeh fired wide at the other end on the break.

Algeria's pressure finally told after 68 minutes, substitute Benobuali rising highest to head home Mahrez's corner.

They added a second, ending debutant Jordan's hopes of reaching the last 32, when Gouiri was ruled onside by VAR as he prodded home from close range after another header from a corner.

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)
